data.title: Alnylam: Buy Rating Reiterated as TTR Strength and Pipeline Prospects Support Unchanged $549 Price Target
data.description:
Salveen Richter, an analyst from Goldman Sachs, maintained the Buy rating on Alnylam Pharma. The associated price target remains the same with $549.00.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Salveen Richter has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors tied to both near‑term execution and longer‑term growth visibility. He acknowledges that Alnylam’s stock has lagged the broader biotech and equity indices amid concerns around Amvuttra’s competitive positioning in ATTR‑cardiomyopathy and a perceived scarcity of catalysts in the first half, yet views the current share price as already reflecting much of this skepticism.

Richter emphasizes continued strength and upside potential in the transthyretin (TTR) franchise, where first‑quarter revenue trends appear broadly on track with consensus despite temporary headwinds from ex‑U.S. pricing, fewer revenue weeks, and insurance resets. He also highlights a robust late‑ and mid‑stage pipeline, including upcoming data from ALN‑6400, ALN‑HTT02, and ALN‑2232, which could establish new proof‑of‑concepts beyond TTR and diversify the revenue base, supporting his unchanged $549 price target and Buy recommendation.

Richter covers the Healthcare sector, focusing on stocks such as Biogen, Regeneron, and Moderna. According to TipRanks, Richter has an average return of 11.0% and a 46.38% success rate on recommended stocks.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
